name: Vermicelli Noodle Salad Bowl with Fermented Sauce

ingredients.item: leek (white part only), thinly sliced, plus 1 tablespoon, minced, divided
block (14 ounces/400 g) firm tofu, cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes
fresh young jackfruit or breadfruit, peeled, or canned jackfruit, drained
dried rice vermicelli noodles or 21 ounces (600 g) fresh rice vermicelli noodles
leaf or iceberg lettuce, shredded or torn
fresh green herbs (such as mint, perilla, cilantro, and/or Asian basil leaves), chopped

method: In a blender, combine the chao cubes, chao brine, fermented soybean sauce, and water and process until smooth. Add pineapple and process into a coarse purée.

In a small skillet, heat 3 tablespoons of vegetable oil over medium-low heat. When hot, add leek slices and cook and stir until golden (about 2 minutes). Leaving the oil in the skillet, use a slotted spoon to transfer fried leek to a small bowl and set aside.

Put skillet over medium-low heat, add minced leek, lemongrass, and 2 tablespoons of annatto oil, and cook and stir until fragrant (about 2 minutes). Add puréed mixture, sugar, and stock powder to pan, and simmer until bubbling (2 to 3 more minutes). Add more sugar if needed to get an equal balance of sweet and savory.

In a medium skillet, heat ½ cup (120 ml) of vegetable oil over medium-low heat. When hot, add tofu cubes and cook until golden brown on all sides (10 to 15 minutes). Transfer to a cooling rack or paper towel–lined plate to drain.

If using fresh young jackfruit, place it in a small saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil and cook until soft enough to be skewered with a fork or chopstick (20 to 25 minutes for fresh or 15 minutes for canned; if using breadfruit, boil for 10 to 15 minutes). Remove from heat, allow to cool, and then cut jackfruit into thin slices. Stack the slices on top of each other and cut along the grain into julienned strips (see Note).
If using dried vermicelli noodles, cook them following the instructions on the package.
Fill each serving bowl one-third with lettuce and herbs, and then add cooked vermicelli noodles on top. Place a few pieces of fried tofu and 2 tablespoons of jackfruit on top.
Drizzle the sauce and 2 tablespoons of annatto oil over the top, sprinkle with roasted peanuts and fried leek, toss, and serve.
